start_msg: 👋 Hi {mention}! I monitor OLX.pl and notify you about new listings. Commands: /add - Add a search /edit - Edit search parameters /list - View your searches /delete - Remove a search /language - Change language /resume - Review pending slopsearch listings /slopgest - AI analysis & suggestions for your searches /help - Show this message
no_searches_err: ❌ You have no searches yet. Use /add to create one first.
slopgest_thinking: 🔍 Analyzing your listings and market data... This may take a minute.
slopgest_err: ❌ Analysis failed. The AI couldn't generate a report. Try again later.
add_mode_prompt: What kind of search would you like to create? 🔔 Link Monitor: You provide a specific OLX URL. I'll notify you whenever a new listing appears on that exact page. 🎯 Precision Search: You know the exact product or type of product you need (e.g. 'Used Ducky One 2 Mini'). I'll find it for you across the platform. 💸 Broad Deal Finder: You have a general need but don't care about specific brands or models (e.g. 'I need a decent gaming laptop'). I'll monitor the market and suggest the best deals. Click a button below or type /cancel to go back.
add_name_prompt: 📝 Let's add a new Link Monitor. First, give it a short name (e.g., 'vintage camera'):
add_url_prompt: 👍 Now send me the OLX.pl search URL for '{name}':
invalid_url_err: ⚠️ Invalid URL. Must be from olx.pl. Try again:
monitor_added:
✅ Now monitoring '{name}'!
I'll check every {mins} minutes.
precision_prompt: 📝 Let's add a new Precision Search. What exactly are you looking for? (e.g., 'A used Thinkpad T480 under 1000 PLN'):
broad_prompt: 💸 Let's add a new Broad Deal Finder. Describe what you want — I'll find specific product models to watch on OLX. (e.g., 'mechanical keyboard with brown switches under 200 PLN'):
thinking_refining: ⏳ Thinking... refining your request into an OLX search.
llm_parse_err: ❌ Failed to parse AI response. Please try /add again or rephrase.
slopsearch_rejected: ❌ Search rejected. Type /add to try again.
cheap_rejected: ❌ Search rejected. Type /add to try again.
modify_prompt: ✏️ What would you like to change? Describe it naturally, e.g. 'lower max price to 800 PLN'.
edit_prompt: ✏️ Which search do you want to edit?
edit_what_prompt: ✏️ Currently editing: {name} ({mode}) Describe what you want to change, e.g. 'lower max price to 800' or 'add keywords: lenovo, dell'.
list_empty: You have no active searches. Use /add.
delete_prompt:
🗑️ Which search do you want to delete?

(Deleting a search permanently removes its data)
delete_success: ✅ Search '{name}' and all its data deleted.
no_pending_items: ✅ All caught up! No pending listings to review.
slopsearch_review_msg: 🎯 {name} matches your search! Type /resume after this to see the next one.
cheap_review_msg: 💸 New deal for {name}: Send a reply to this message to give feedback to the AI (e.g. 'wrong model', 'too expensive').
feedback_thinking: ⏳ Refining search based on your feedback...
feedback_applied: ✅ Feedback applied to '{name}'. The AI will adjust future listings.
scrape_error:
❌ No listings found for '{name}'. The URL may be invalid.
Please /delete it and /add a new search.
scrape_reviewing:
✅ Scraping complete for '{name}'. Found {found} potential matches.
Type /resume to start reviewing.
cheap_rejected_log: Cheap: all {count} listings for '{product}' rejected by LLM
finding_products: ⏳ Finding the best product models for you...
refining_feedback: 🔄 Got it! Refining your product list based on feedback...
update_failed: ❌ Failed to update. Please describe the change differently.
update_failed_retry: ❌ Couldn't process changes. Try describing them differently.
generate_failed: ❌ Failed to generate product list. Please try /add again or rephrase.
refine_failed: ❌ Couldn't refine the list right now. Feedback saved for later.
